title: carex divisa var. moniziana
intro: Carex divisa var. moniziana, also known as the greater wood sedge, is a plant species within the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to Western Europe. The medicinal properties of Carex divisa var. moniziana include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate urinary issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Carex divisa var. moniziana may include teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
